user.title: Yahoo! Japan Weather
user.description: Select the prefecture for the weather forecast.

forecast_area.title: Select forecast area
forecast_area.description: Select a Yahoo! Japan forecast area.

municipality.title: Select municipality
municipality.description: Select the city, ward, town, or village to add.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure location
reconfigure.description: Select a new prefecture for this weather entity.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Yahoo! Japan Weather.
error.invalid_weather: The selected page did not contain valid current weather data. Your existing location was not changed.
error.no_locations: No selectable weather locations were found on this page.
error.location_in_use: The selected municipality is already used by another config entry.

abort.already_configured: This Yahoo! Japan weather area is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The weather location was updated successfully.
